compiled_state.title: Write RED tests for REBASE_HEAD filtering in capture-review-diff.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add 2 test functions to tests/hooks/test-merge-aware-diff.sh:

1. test_capture_diff_rebase_scopes_to_worktree: Create git repo (mktemp -d, trap cleanup). Simulate REBASE_HEAD state (.git/REBASE_HEAD + .git/rebase-merge/onto + .git/rebase-merge/orig-head — NOT .git/ORIG_HEAD). Invoke capture-review-diff.sh. Inspect output diff to verify it only contains worktree-branch changes.

2. test_capture_diff_rebase_failsafe: REBASE_HEAD without onto file. Verify fallback to full diff.

IMPORTANT: Write orig-head to .git/rebase-merge/orig-head, NOT .git/ORIG_HEAD.

## TDD Requirement
Tests FAIL (RED) — no REBASE_HEAD handling in capture-review-diff.sh.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-merge-aware-diff.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify — add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] At least 2 new rebase test functions
  Verify: grep -c "test_capture_diff_rebase" tests/hooks/test-merge-aware-diff.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added
  Verify: grep -q 'capture-review-diff.*test_capture_diff_rebase' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Tests must verify BOTH the diff file AND stat file are scoped to worktree-branch files during rebase. capture-review-diff.sh produces two outputs (DIFF_FILE and STAT_FILE), both using _MERGE_FILE_PATHSPECS and _merge_base.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: RED verified ✓ — test_capture_diff_rebase_scopes_to_worktree fails with 4 behavioral assertions (diff and stat both include pre-onto.txt when they should not, and both miss worktree-feature.txt when they should include it)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: ACs validated ✓ — (1) run-all.sh RED zone tolerance covers new failures via .test-index marker; (2) 12 references to test_capture_diff_rebase (>= 2 functions); (3) .test-index RED marker confirmed at capture-review-diff.sh:tests/hooks/test-merge-aware-diff.sh [test_capture_diff_rebase_scopes_to_worktree]
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Self-check complete ✓ — all assertions are behavioral (execute script, assert on diff.txt + stat.txt content), no structural tests, no source file reading, tests survive internal refactoring
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
